title: Senior Manager, Group Strategic Comms - TMT
description:
• Own group-level reputation strategy.
  • Build and lead a best-in-class communications function.

About Our Client

Our client is a leading, highly reputable organisation with a strong regional presence and a complex stakeholder landscape. Known for its scale, innovation and public profile, the organisation places a strong emphasis on brand, trust and corporate reputation, operating in a fast-evolving, highly scrutinised environment.

Job Description

  • Develop and execute integrated corporate communications strategies to strengthen reputation and drive positive media coverage across traditional, digital and social platforms
  • Lead proactive media engagement and manage relationships with key journalists and outlets
  • Shape and deliver high-quality, multi-format content for announcements, campaigns and thought leadership
  • Organise and manage press briefings, media events and major corporate announcements
  • Provide strategic communications counsel to senior management and cross-functional stakeholders
  • Lead issues and crisis communications, including monitoring media and public sentiment, preparing response strategies and managing reputational risk
  • Track and analyse communications outcomes to assess impact and continuously improve effectiveness
  • Lead and develop a high-performing communications team and manage agency partners

The Successful Applicant

  • At least 8 years' experience in corporate communications, ideally within a large, complex or publicly listed organisation
  • Strong track record in media relations, strategic communications planning, and issues and crisis management
  • Proven experience advising and working closely with senior leadership and multiple stakeholders
  • Exceptional writing, editing and storytelling capabilities across corporate and external communications
  • Commercially astute, with the ability to translate organisational objectives into clear, impactful messaging
  • Confident leader with experience managing teams and agencies in a fast-paced, high-visibility environment
  • Highly organised, detail-oriented and proactive, with strong judgement and the gravitas to handle sensitive and high-profile situations

What's on Offer

  • A senior, high-visibility role with direct exposure to Group leadership and involvement in organisation-wide strategic communications
  • Opportunity to shape and influence corporate reputation at scale within a complex, highly scrutinised environment
  • Broad remit spanning media relations, issues and crisis management, and thought leadership, offering strong professional depth and career progression
  • The chance to lead and develop a high-performing communications team and work with top-tier agency partners
  • A stable, well-established organisation with strong brand equity, clear structure and long-term career pathways

Contact
